title: build(deps): bump github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface from 0.4.0 to 0.5.0
body:
Bumps [github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface](https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface) from 0.4.0 to 0.5.0.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface's releases.

v0.5.0

What's Changed

  • pkg/cdi: implement automatic CDI registry refresh. by @​klihub in container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface#56
  • pkg/cdi: add functions for writing Spec files. by @​klihub in container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface#64
  • build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/runc from 1.0.3 to 1.1.2 by @​dependabot in container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface#68
  • Relax device name restriction by @​elezar in container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface#70
  • documentation: add configuration instructions by @​bart0sh in container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface#67
  • Add HostPath to DeviceNode to allow for use cases where device nodes are not at root by @​elezar in container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface#73

New Contributors

  • @​dependabot made their first contribution in container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface#68

Full Changelog: https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/compare/v0.4.0...v0.5.0

Commits
  • baded62 Merge pull request #73 from elezar/add-host-path
  • dc8524e Bump spec version to 0.5.0
  • 16cae32 Use HostPath to determine device properties
  • efa3c30 Add option HostPath to DeviceNode
  • 3dfdac4 Merge pull request #67 from bart0sh/PR0013-config-documentation
  • 221a03d README.md: update with minimal CRI-O configuration.
  • f525fb7 documentation: add note on podman integration history
  • ebf2045 documentation: add podman configuration to readme
  • 4a1c175 documentation: add configuration instructions
  • 3b39456 Merge pull request #70 from elezar/relax-device-name
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot merge` will merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot squash and merge` will squash and merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot cancel merge` will cancel a previously requested merge and block automerging - `@dependabot reopen` will reopen this PR if it is closed - `@dependabot close` will close this PR and stop Dependabot recreating it. You can achieve the same result by closing it manually - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)

comments.body:

@dependabot rebase
